_comment: Community resources for Seymour and Jackson County. Conservative list — only items with verifiable public record (city site, schools website, public 501c3, or direct web presence). For everything else, visitors submit via /tip.html and Gary verifies before adding.

items.name: Make Seymour Shine cleanup week
items.blurb: City's annual citywide spring cleanup with extra curbside debris pickup. Organized by City Hall.

items.name: Crossroads Acoustic Festival
items.blurb: Two-day downtown acoustic music festival. Promoted by Seymour Main Street.

items.name: Crossroads of Cultures
items.blurb: Annual cultural festival downtown.

items.name: Jackson County Fair
items.blurb: 4-H showcase, livestock, midway, music. Hosted at the county fairgrounds in Brownstown.

items.name: BurgerFest
items.blurb: World's Largest Hamburger Parade, Bun Run, eating contest, live music. 36th year in 2026.

items.name: Anchor House Family Assistance Center
items.blurb: Food pantry, household goods, emergency family services. The main hub for emergency food in Jackson County.

items.name: Salvation Army Seymour
items.blurb: Food pantry and emergency assistance — call before stopping by for current hours.

items.name: Boys & Girls Club of Seymour
items.blurb: After-school programs, summer camps, sports for kids and teens.

items.name: Girls Inc. of Jackson County
items.blurb: Programs for girls 6-18: STEM, leadership, healthy living.

items.name: 4-H Jackson County (Purdue Extension)
items.blurb: Animal projects, scholarships, county fair. Run through Purdue Extension.

items.name: SHS Owls athletics
items.blurb: Seymour High School sports schedules — football, basketball, baseball, softball, volleyball, tennis, golf, track, cross country, soccer, swimming, wrestling.

items.name: Trinity Lutheran Cougars
items.blurb: Athletics for the private Christian high school south of town.

items.name: Seymour Community Schools (SCSC)
items.blurb: District site — alerts, calendars, athletics, news.

items.name: Make Seymour Shine cleanup week
items.blurb: Citywide spring cleanup. Coordinate via City Hall.

items.name: Crossroads of Cultures festival
items.blurb: Volunteer day-of for setup, info booths, kids' activities.

items.name: Jackson County Fair
items.blurb: Gate workers, parking volunteers, livestock helpers via 4-H.

items.name: BurgerFest 2026
items.blurb: Volunteer day-of: parade staging, Bun Run setup, info booths.

items.name: Anchor House food drives (rolling)
items.blurb: Sort donations, pack pantry boxes, drive deliveries.

items.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
items.blurb: Call or text 988 — 24/7, free, confidential.

items.name: Anchor House emergency assistance
items.blurb: Emergency food, hygiene kits, household goods. Call before driving over.

items.name: Turning Point Domestic Violence Services
items.blurb: 24-hour crisis line, shelter, advocacy. Serves the south-central Indiana region.

items.name: Centerstone (mental health)
items.blurb: Mental health and addiction services across Indiana.

items.name: Indiana 211
items.blurb: Dial 2-1-1 for help finding human services in Indiana.

items.name: City of Seymour (official)
items.blurb: Council agendas, public-comment intake, calendar, codes.

items.name: Jackson County Government
items.blurb: County offices, courts, recorder, treasurer, surveyor.

items.name: Jackson County Public Library — Seymour
items.blurb: Library services, programs, public computers.

items.name: Submit a community resource
items.blurb: We keep this list short and verified — no made-up entries. If your group, church, sports league, or volunteer event isn't here, drop it on the tip line and we'll verify and add it. We need the name, address (street number please), website, and what the group does.
